business.name: Build it construction, Fence, Pergola, Outdoors Stone Masonry, concrete, landscape

homepage.heroSubline: Build It Construction delivers superior craftsmanship and lasting value. Specializing in fences, pergolas, stonework and outdoor living spaces for discerning homeowners.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Quality, Rooted in Arlington
aboutText: Build It Construction started with a simple goal: to provide Arlington residents with high-quality, durable fences and outdoor structures they could rely on. We're not just builders; we're your neighbors, committed to enhancing our community one project at a time.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, premium materials, and skilled execution. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every job, big or small. We treat your property like it's our own, ensuring minimal disruption and maximum satisfaction.

We're proud to be an active part of the Arlington community, supporting local initiatives and organizations. We understand the unique needs of Arlington homeowners, from weathering our hot summers to withstanding the occasional ice storm. Let us help you create an outdoor space that's both beautiful and built to last.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Years of experience building fences and outdoor structures that stand the test of time.

valueProps.title: Premium Materials
valueProps.description: We only use high-quality lumber, stone, and concrete to ensure lasting durability and beauty.

valueProps.title: Custom Designs
valueProps.description: Tailored solutions to match your unique style and property, from classic to contemporary.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Arlington's climate, soil conditions, and building codes.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Ready to Transform Your Outdoor Space?
homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote today and discover the Build It Construction difference.

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your property with a classic and durable wood fence.
services.description: A wood fence provides privacy, security, and timeless appeal to any Arlington home. Build It Construction specializes in crafting custom wood fences using premium materials, built to withstand the Texas climate. We offer a wide variety of wood types, including cedar, pine, and treated lumber, each offering unique aesthetic and durability characteristics. Our experienced team handles every step of the process, from initial consultation and design to professional installation and finishing. We carefully assess your property lines, soil conditions, and HOA requirements to ensure a seamless and compliant installation. Whether you're looking for a traditional picket fence, a privacy fence, or a decorative accent, we will design and build a wood fence that meets your specific needs and enhances the beauty of your outdoor space. We ensure proper post depth and spacing to prevent leaning and warping and use high-quality fasteners and hardware for long-lasting performance. We also offer staining and sealing services to protect your wood fence from the elements and maintain its natural beauty for years to come.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and design consultation
Step 3: Professional installation of posts and panels

faq.question: How long does wood fence installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a standard wood fence installation takes between 2-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in Arlington?
faq.answer: Cedar is a popular choice due to its natural resistance to rot and insects. Treated pine is another cost-effective option that offers good durability with proper maintenance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a fence in Arlington?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is generally required for fence installation in Arlington. We can assist you with the permitting process to ensure compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Pergola Construction
services.shortDescription: Create a stunning outdoor living space with a custom-built pergola.
services.description: A pergola adds elegance and shade to any backyard, creating a perfect space for relaxation and entertainment. Build It Construction designs and builds custom pergolas tailored to your specific needs and style. We use premium-grade lumber and materials to ensure lasting durability and beauty. Our experienced craftsmen can create a variety of pergola styles, from simple and modern to elaborate and traditional. We work closely with you to determine the ideal size, shape, and placement of your pergola to maximize shade and enhance your outdoor living experience. We also offer a range of customization options, including lattice, screens, and lighting, to create a truly unique and functional space. Our pergolas are built to withstand the Texas weather, with proper anchoring and weather-resistant finishes. Beyond aesthetics, we focus on structural integrity, ensuring your pergola is a safe and enjoyable haven for years to come. We can also integrate your pergola with existing patios, decks, or landscaping to create a cohesive and harmonious outdoor environment.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and site planning
Step 2: Material selection and pergola style

faq.question: What is the best material for a pergola in Arlington?
faq.answer: Cedar and redwood are excellent choices due to their natural resistance to rot and insects. Pressure-treated lumber is another affordable and durable option.

faq.question: Can you attach a pergola to my house?
faq.answer: Yes, we can build attached or freestanding pergolas, depending on your preferences and property layout. We will ensure the attachment is structurally sound and aesthetically pleasing.

faq.question: How much does a pergola cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a pergola varies depending on the size, materials, and design complexity. We provide free, detailed quotes to help you plan your budget.

services.name: Outdoor Stone Masonry
services.shortDescription: Add timeless beauty and durability to your outdoor space with custom stonework.
services.description: Build It Construction specializes in creating stunning outdoor stone features that enhance the beauty and value of your property. From stone patios and walkways to retaining walls and outdoor fireplaces, we deliver exceptional craftsmanship and lasting results. We work with a variety of natural stones, including limestone, sandstone, and granite, to create unique and durable features that complement your home's architecture and landscaping. Our experienced masons are skilled in a variety of techniques, including dry-stacking, mortaring, and veneering, to create custom designs that meet your specific needs and preferences. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage and structural integrity to withstand the Texas climate. Whether you're looking to create a cozy outdoor living space or add curb appeal to your home, our stone masonry services will transform your outdoor space into a beautiful and functional extension of your home. We handle everything from design and material selection to installation and finishing, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

faq.question: What type of stone is best for outdoor use in Arlington?
faq.answer: Limestone and sandstone are popular choices due to their durability and resistance to weathering. We can help you select the best stone for your specific project and budget.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a stone patio or walkway?
faq.answer: Typically, permits are required for structures exceeding a certain size or those that alter drainage patterns. We can assist you with the permitting process.

faq.question: How do I maintain my stone patio or walkway?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and water is generally sufficient. We can also recommend sealants to protect your stone from stains and weathering.

services.name: Concrete Services
services.shortDescription: Durable and reliable concrete solutions for your outdoor projects.
services.description: Build It Construction provides a full range of concrete services for Arlington homeowners, from driveways and sidewalks to patios and foundations. We use high-quality concrete mixes and proven techniques to ensure lasting durability and a smooth, professional finish. Our experienced team handles every step of the process, from site preparation and formwork to pouring, finishing, and curing. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper grading and drainage to prevent cracking and settling. We offer a variety of concrete finishes, including broom finish, stamped concrete, and exposed aggregate, to create custom designs that complement your home's style. Whether you're looking to replace an old driveway, add a new patio, or build a solid foundation for your outdoor structure, our concrete services will provide a durable and reliable solution. We understand the importance of proper curing to achieve maximum strength and longevity, and we take the time to ensure your concrete project is built to last.

faq.question: How long does concrete take to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure, but it can be walked on after 24-48 hours. We recommend avoiding heavy traffic for at least 7 days.

faq.question: What is the best concrete mix for a driveway?
faq.answer: A concrete mix with a high compressive strength (typically 4000 PSI or higher) is recommended for driveways to withstand heavy loads and traffic.

faq.question: How can I prevent my concrete from cracking?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation, reinforcement, and curing are essential to prevent cracking. We also recommend using expansion joints to accommodate temperature changes.

services.name: Landscape Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Transform your yard into a beautiful and functional outdoor oasis.
services.description: Build It Construction offers comprehensive landscape design and installation services to create stunning outdoor spaces for Arlington homeowners. We work closely with you to develop a custom landscape plan that reflects your style, needs, and budget. Our experienced team handles every aspect of the project, from initial design and plant selection to installation, irrigation, and lighting. We carefully consider your property's existing features, soil conditions, and drainage patterns to create a landscape that thrives in the Texas climate. We offer a wide range of landscaping services, including planting trees, shrubs, and flowers, installing sod and mulch, building retaining walls and pathways, and creating outdoor living spaces. Whether you're looking to create a tranquil garden, a vibrant entertainment area, or a sustainable landscape, our landscape design and installation services will transform your yard into a beautiful and functional extension of your home. We select drought-tolerant plants that thrive in Arlington's hot summers and provide ongoing maintenance to keep your landscape looking its best.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and site analysis
Step 3: Plant selection and material sourcing

faq.question: What are some drought-tolerant plants for Arlington?
faq.answer: Texas sage, lantana, and yucca are excellent choices for drought-tolerant landscaping in Arlington. They require minimal watering and thrive in the Texas heat.

faq.question: How often should I water my lawn in Arlington?
faq.answer: Watering deeply but infrequently is generally recommended. Aim for about 1 inch of water per week, depending on the weather conditions.

faq.question: Do you offer landscape maintenance services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing landscape maintenance services, including mowing, pruning, fertilization, and weed control, to keep your landscape looking its best.

services.name: Fence Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable fence repair services to keep your fence strong and secure.
services.description: Don't let a damaged fence compromise your property's security and curb appeal. Build It Construction provides prompt and professional fence repair services for Arlington homeowners. Whether your fence has been damaged by weather, age, or impact, our experienced team can quickly assess the damage and provide effective repairs. We repair all types of fences, including wood, metal, and vinyl. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs that restore your fence's strength and stability. From replacing broken posts and panels to repairing gates and latches, we handle all types of fence repairs, large and small. We understand the importance of a secure and well-maintained fence, and we're committed to providing reliable repair services that protect your property and enhance its value. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help extend the life of your fence and prevent future damage.

faq.question: How do I know if my fence needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of fence damage include leaning posts, broken panels, loose gates, and rust or rot. If you notice any of these issues, it's time to call for a repair.

faq.question: Can you match the existing style of my fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match the style and materials of your existing fence to ensure a seamless repair.

faq.question: How long does fence repair take?
faq.answer: Most fence repairs can be completed in a day or two, depending on the extent of the damage.

serviceAreas.content:
Build it construction, Fence, Pergola, Outdoors Stone Masonry, concrete, landscape is proud to offer our comprehensive fence, pergola, stone masonry, concrete, and landscaping services to the residents of Dallas, Texas. From the iconic skyline to the charming neighborhoods filled with 1950s ranch homes, we understand the unique needs of Dallas homeowners. We're committed to providing high-quality craftsmanship and exceptional customer service to enhance the beauty and value of your property.

Whether you're looking to install a new privacy fence, build a custom pergola for your backyard, create stunning outdoor living spaces with stone masonry, or need concrete work we have you covered. We have years of experience working in the Dallas area and are familiar with the specific challenges and opportunities that the hot, humid summers present. Let us help you create the outdoor space of your dreams.
serviceAreas.localContext: Dallas is known for its diverse architecture, from mid-century ranch homes to modern masterpieces, requiring adaptable fencing and outdoor solutions.

serviceAreas.content:

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Build It Construction did an amazing job installing our new cedar fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! It really enhances our backyard privacy. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: We hired Build It Construction to pour a concrete patio in our backyard. The work was done well, and the price was fair. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated effectively throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: We absolutely love our new pergola! Build It Construction helped us design the perfect structure for our outdoor space. The craftsmanship is excellent, and it's become our favorite spot to relax.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: Our fence was damaged during a recent storm, and Build It Construction came to the rescue! They quickly repaired the broken sections, and the fence is now stronger than ever. Great service!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: Build It Construction transformed our overgrown yard into a beautiful and functional landscape. The team was knowledgeable and creative, and they helped us choose plants that thrive in the Arlington climate. Very happy with the results!

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: The stone walkway Build It Construction installed is stunning! They are true artists, and the attention to detail is incredible. It has completely transformed the look of our front yard.
